question: The chart shows average website sign-ups per year, with the latest value only up to Apr 01, 2024. Which of the following statements is most appropriate?

options.A: The latest year shows a sharp decline compared to previous years.
options.B: The latest year has clearly performed worse than any earlier year.
options.C: None of the above conclusions about the full-year trend are justified from this partial-year data.
options.D: The latest year proves that sign-ups are now permanently declining.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 2 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (198 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 1,190 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
